title: New geotechnical drill rig arriving next week
body: The new rig expands our shallow-investigation capacity. A training session will be scheduled for field staff.

title: Welcome Dhaval to the geotechnical team
body: Please join us in welcoming Dhaval Patel, our newest Geotechnical Engineer Graduate.

title: Summer office hours start July 1
body: Friday early-close (3:00 PM) runs through Labour Day. See HR for the full schedule.
